x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Identification Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Determines which assets (cash, securities, bonds, or other approved instruments) can be used as collateral.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Valuation Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Assesses the market value of pledged assets.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Allocation Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Assesses the market value of pledged assets.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Reallocation Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Allocates specific assets to secure specific exposures, transactions, or obligations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Monitoring Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tracks changes in market value of collateral.

Initiates margin calls if collateral value falls below required thresholds.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Reporting Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Provides records of pledged assets, their allocation, and usage.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Custody Coordination Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Manages delivery and receipt of collateral between parties or custodians.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Risk Optimization Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Allocates collateral efficiently to minimize costs while meeting risk exposure requirements.
